title: Expand fault matrix Party A/B breakdowns and scenario coverage

requirements.text: Expand the FaultMatrixPanel component to display complete Party A and Party B fault percentage breakdowns for all scenarios defined in faultMatrix.ts, including contributing factors and rationale text for each scenario entry.

quotes: flesh out the full Party A/B percentage breakdowns and expand the scenario coverage in the fault matrix

acceptanceCriteria: Every scenario in faultMatrix.ts has its Party A and Party B fault percentages visually displayed as labelled bars or numeric values.
Contributing factors and rationale are shown for each scenario row in the panel.
The active scenario (based on provided violation type) is highlighted distinctly from inactive ones.

requirements.text: Expand the scenario coverage in faultMatrix.ts to include all common road incident scenario types already referenced in scenarioReferences.ts (rear-end, red light, lane change, and any remaining unmapped types), ensuring each has fault percentages, contributing factors, rationale, and related violation types.

quotes: expand the scenario coverage in the fault matrix

acceptanceCriteria: faultMatrix.ts contains entries for all seven scenario types present in scenarioReferences.ts.
Each new scenario entry includes Party A percentage, Party B percentage, contributing factors array, rationale string, and related violation types.
FaultMatrixPanel renders all newly added scenarios without errors.

requirements.text: Update FaultReferenceDisplay on the FaultReferencePage to show the full fault percentage breakdown (Party A and Party B with labelled bars) alongside legal references when a scenario is selected, consistent with the expanded faultMatrix.ts data.
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting any scenario on the Fault Reference page displays both Party A and Party B fault percentages with visual bars.
The displayed percentages match the values in faultMatrix.ts for the selected scenario.
Legal references (Highway Code, RTA 1988, case law) continue to display alongside the fault breakdown.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All data changes must remain in static frontend data files (faultMatrix.ts, scenarioReferences.ts); no backend schema changes required.
nonGoals: Adding new backend canister methods or modifying backend/main.mo.
Changing the routing structure or adding new pages.
